STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-03-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 8/25/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUJIMOTO CORPORATION, A CORP DBA EL DORADO MANOR $6,675.79 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,298.57 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,739.36
